{{CargoRelic
|name=Dragon Copper Pot
|class_id=20531
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The name is derived from the story of a fish becoming a dragon, which means the change of luck. After placing ingredients into the Morphing Dragon Pot and leaving them for a day, the taste remains unchanged, but the dish has been imbued with a blessing. Note that good luck will be bestowed upon those with good fortune, while those with bad fortune will become even more unlucky.
|fame=13
|art=17
|fth=15
|civ=32
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail ATK +1<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300
|ss2=Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail ATK +2<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300
|ss3=Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail ATK +3<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300
|ss4=Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail ATK +3<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300
|ss7=Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail ATK +3<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300<br> (Awakened)
}}
